text: On June 27, 2025, Lifted acquired 100 % of the equity interests of Bubty, a Netherlands-based platform supporting enterprise management of contingent workforce solutions, for total purchase price consideration of $ 20.4 million.

Since our inception, our business has consisted of the operation of an online work marketplace that connects businesses with independent talent from across the globe and the provision of additional contingent workforce solutions through Lifted and its subsidiaries.
